2606.31808.title: Large Databases Need Small, Open-Weight Language Models
2606.31808.paper_summary: Language model systems built around proprietary APIs often operate on a token-based cost model. This becomes prohibitively expensive in the context of large databases, where LM-enhanced relational operators can incur costs exceeding $10,000 for a single set of experiments, hindering thorough research and practical deployment. In this paper, we demonstrate that quantized, open-weight models running locally on just 16GB of VRAM can match or exceed the accuracy of closed-source counterparts at lower latency and a fraction of the price, challenging the prevailing assumption that closed-source LM APIs are necessary for effective LM-database integration. We present and analyze the key system optimizations required to efficiently deploy these open-weight models within an LM-DB system. By integrating these local models into the BlendSQL v0.1.0 framework, we demonstrate a 390x reduction in overall costs and 3.8x reduction in latency compared to a proprietary LM API. We make our code available at https://github.com/CapitalOne-Research/play-by-the-type-rules/tree/main/sembench.
2606.31808.paper_summary_zh: 語言模型系統通常基於專有API運作，並採用基於標記的成本模型。在大型數據庫的背景下，這變得極其昂貴，因為增強型關聯運算符的成本可能超過$10,000，僅針對一組實驗，這阻礙了徹底的研究和實際部署。在本文中，我們展示了量化的開放權重模型在僅使用16GB的VRAM本地運行時，可以在較低的延遲和一小部分價格下匹配或超過封閉源模型的準確性，挑戰了封閉源LM API對於有效的LM-數據庫整合是必要的普遍假設。我們提出並分析了在LM-DB系統中有效部署這些開放權重模型所需的關鍵系統優化。通過將這些本地模型整合到BlendSQL v0.1.0框架中，我們展示了與專有LM API相比，整體成本降低了390倍，延遲降低了3.8倍。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/CapitalOne-Research/play-by-the-type-rules/tree/main/sembench 獲得。
2606.31808.author: Parker Glenn et.al.
